'''Josta Cracken''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] from [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
She eventually moved to [[Contruum/Legends|Contruum]] and [[Marriage/Legends|married]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] in the days before the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]]. They had two children, [[Pash Cracken|Pash]] and [[Dena Cracken|Dena]].
